verses.1: My son, if you will receive my words,
verses.2: so as to turn your ear to wisdom,
verses.3: yes, if you call out for discernment,
verses.4: if you seek her as silver,
verses.5: then you will understand the fear of the LORD,
verses.7: He lays up sound wisdom for the upright.
verses.8: that he may guard the paths of justice,
verses.9: Then you will understand righteousness and justice,
verses.10: For wisdom will enter into your heart.
verses.12: to deliver you from the way of evil,
verses.13: who forsake the paths of uprightness,
verses.15: who are crooked in their ways,
verses.16: to deliver you from the strange woman,
verses.17: who forsakes the friend of her youth,
verses.18: for her house leads down to death,
verses.19: None who go to her return again,
verses.20: Therefore walk in the way of good men,
verses.21: For the upright will dwell in the land.
verses.22: But the wicked will be cut off from the land.
